settings.title: Everything You Need Lies Within
settings.subtitle: Flashy Focus
settings.description:
The CSD brings GT race car instrumentation to your sim, with a 5" IPS screen displaying real-time data via SimHub. 4 tactile knobs offer easy control, while the LED array provides RPM lights, flag indicators, and customizable alerts for immersive feedback.
 
Designed for precision and immersion, it puts all key racing metrics at a glance.

settings.title: Comprehensive SimHub Integration
settings.description: CONSPIT works closely with SimHub to continuously enhance product features. The CSD is fully compatible with SimHub's dashboard functionality, providing essential, ready-to-use preset SimHub file for dashboard displays, telemetry indicators, and integrated control functions.

settings.title: High-Resolution 5-inch Touchscreen
settings.description:
The CSD features a 5-inch IPS touchscreen with a resolution of 854 x 480 and 350 lumens of brightness, ensuring a clear, high-quality display with vibrant colors.

The screen brightness can be easily adjusted using the knob on the upper right side, allowing you to fine-tune it to match the ambient lighting during gameplay.

settings.title: CONSPIT Exclusive Dash Pages
settings.description: In addition to supporting all Dash Pages available on SimHub, we've also created custom CONSPIT Dash Pages for download. These pages feature highly optimized data displays tailored for competitive racing scenarios, with seamlessly integrated visual elements that perfectly match CONSPIT's hardware design style.

settings.title: Segmented Indicator LEDs
settings.description: The CSD dashboard features four segmented indicator zones with 31 customizable LEDs, keeping drivers focused on the track while effortlessly providing key race information.

settings.title: Out-of-the-Box Display Functions
settings.description:
RPM, flags, vehicle status, session info, radar, and more... 

The CSD comes with a preloaded LED profile featuring over 20 preconfigured modes for vehicle status and track conditions. This lets users immediately access SimHub's powerful data and enjoy an immersive racing experience without complex setup.

settings.title: Multi-Dimensional Interactive Experience
settings.description:
The CSD features four encoder knobs and a touchscreen with presets:
/Side knobs: Quick LED/brightness adjustment / Main knob: Dashboard page navigation / Touchscreen: Auxiliary page cycling 

All controls are fully customizable to meet a variety of user preferences.

settings.title: Race-Grade CNC Machined Aluminum Shell
settings.description: Crafted from 6061-T6 aluminum alloy using CNC machining, the shell features a fine sandblasted and anodized finish for enhanced durability and resilience.

settings.title: Dual Data Interface
settings.description: The dashboard is equipped with two data ports at the rear, allowing users to choose either port based on the preferred dashboard mounting method, facilitating convenient setup of your entire sim cockpit setup.

settings.title: Mount It on Your Sim-rig
settings.description: The CSD can be mounted on CONSPIT GT-Lite, aluminum profile rigs, or other third-party sim racing rigs using dedicated adapters.

settings.title: Mount It on Your Wheelbase
settings.description: CSD can also be installed on most  wheelbases using adapter brackets.

settings.title: CONSPIT Aesthetic Style
settings.description: Exemplifying precision and modernity, the design philosophy of CONSPIT relentlessly pursues the seamless integration of modern technology with racing industry aesthetics, and the CSD dashboard is no exception.
